session.user: Run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report all results. DO NOT fix any errors - just run the command and report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run `make fast-ci` from the repository root and report the results.

All tests and checks passed successfully. Here's a summary of the `make fast-ci` results:
**Lint & Format Checks:** - Ruff lint check: All checks passed - Ruff format check: 1745 files already formatted - Prettier check: All matched files use Prettier code style - Exec reference check: `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date - Type checking (ty): All checks passed
**Test Results:** - erk unit tests: 5866 passed, 13 skipped in 13.86s - erk-dev tests: 138 passed in 5.20s - erk-statusline tests: 123 passed in 0.78s - erk-mcp tests: 50 passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md files: 19 checked, 0 violations
**Overall Status:** All checks and tests passed with no errors.
